case.title: SAFEGUARD MUTUAL INSURANCE v. HOUS. AUTH., CITY, CAMDEN

opinion.h1: SAFEGUARD MUTUAL INSURANCE v. HOUS. AUTH., CITY, CAMDEN, 390 U.S. 716 (1968)
opinion.h4: SAFEGUARD MUTUAL INSURANCE CO. v. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY OF CAMDEN ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPERIOR COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 1208. Decided April 22, 1968.
opinion.p: Malcolm W. Berkowitz and Sidney W. Bookbinder for appellant.
Bryan B. McKernan for appellee Housing Authority of the City of Camden.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
